generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR detecting objects in vehicle's proximity via point cloud generation for adaptive cruise control (ACC) decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing 3D environmental context for object tracking in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthEnvironmentData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors capturing real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for ACC decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor Actuation Functional Entity converting desired speed into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for ACC implementation"
]

instance SteeringActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo Actuation Functional Entity handling steering adjustments for ACC control commands"
]

// C3: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Components
instance PointCloudProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based Functional Entity processing raw LiDAR data using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based Functional Entity aggregating ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and object tracks into structured SQL database formats for ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables SQLDatabase
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based Functional Entity ensuring interoperability between ROS2 nodes and Wi-Fi communication, handling unit conversions and message serialization for cloud transmission (100ms latency per hop)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudDigitalTwinEntity
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance DepthEnvironmentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudProcessingFE
]

instance StructuredVehicleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollectionFE
]

instance SerializedDataPackage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslationFE
]

// C5: Data Models
instance CADVehicleModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the autonomous vehicle for real-time rendering in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
]

instance EnvironmentCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based environmental visualization for object detection and tracking in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python/C++ implementation of DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point cloud processing in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingFE
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking in ACC Digital Twin's point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingFE
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink implementation of ACC control logic adhering to ISO 15622 Performance Class I standards"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudDigitalTwinEntity
]

// C6: Data Storage
instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series object tracks generated from LiDAR data processing in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) for ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuredVehicleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance SimulationDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of simulation results including processed point clouds and control logic outputs for ACC Digital Twin validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SerializedDataPackage
]

// C7: Digital Twin Entity
instance CloudDigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Single centralized Digital Twin Entity hosting all ACC-related processing and control logic for the autonomous vehicle, with decentralized data storage components"
    DTDFVocab:contains PointCloudProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, CADVehicleModel, EnvironmentCADModel, ACCControlLogicModel
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

// C8: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D virtual cockpit in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackingVisualizationInsight, PathProjectionVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle's resource-constrained ECUs to cloud-based processing (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) for high-fidelity simulations in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicSimulationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management interface enabling operators/developers to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and trigger emergency braking via control panel UI in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlToggleAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

// C9: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication and real-time data processing in ACC Digital Twin system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonHardware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano microcomputers providing edge processing capabilities for ACC system components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware abstraction and integration with ACC system components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance Custom3DVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom 3D visualization functional entity rendering real-time object tracks and driving paths in ACC Digital Twin's virtual cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADVehicleModel, EnvironmentCADModel
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for persistent storage of vehicle state data and object tracks in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackDatabase, VehicleStateDatabase
]

// C10: Insights/Actions
instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC metrics (speed adjustments, emergency braking) enables data-driven decisions for tuning or maintenance in the Digital Twin"
]

instance RemoteDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Developers use DT's data collection capabilities to troubleshoot ACC failures or sensor drift during prototyping via remote diagnostics"
]

instance SafetyValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote management features (emergency braking) ensure safe operation in non-human environments through validated Digital Twin operations"
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle in the 3D virtual cockpit for ACC performance monitoring"
]

instance ObjectTrackingVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time rendering of detected object tracks in the 3D environment for ACC system validation"
]

instance PathProjectionVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of driving paths based on current vehicle state and object positions for ACC decision support"
]

instance ControlLogicSimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "High-fidelity simulation of ACC control logic offloaded to cloud processing for validation and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlToggleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable functionality for ACC system control via Digital Twin interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired cruise control speed through Digital Twin management interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command via Digital Twin remote management system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C11: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LiDARSensor, DepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor, MotorActuationFE, SteeringActuationFE
]

instance ACCDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CloudDigitalTwinEntity, ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonHardware, NVIDIAJetpackSDK,
        Custom3DVisualizationFE, SQLDatabase, PointCloudProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin sends control commands to the physical twin via Wi-Fi (UDP-based) to execute ACC functions:
  - **ACC Controlling FE** computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (ISO 15622 compliance for Performance Class I ACC).
  - **Actuation FE** translates speed commands into motor voltage commands for the Vedder Speed Controller, adjusting vehicle speed.
  - **Control Panel FE** enables remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) via a 3D visualization interface. Synchronization ensures <100ms end-to-end latency for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time granularity** with:
  - **Data Collection**: 100ms frequency for ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and object tracks (updated via ROS2 topics).
  - **Control Loop**: ACC decision-making and actuation occur at **~100ms intervals** (aligned with 3GPP V2V latency requirements).
  - **Synchronization**: Clock accuracy of **≤100ms** across distributed nodes (ROS2 time synchronization mechanisms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts all vehicle-specific functionalities (e.g., LiDAR processing, actuation) and interfaces with sensors/actuators.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Aggregates data (object tracks, ego vehicle state) and computes ACC logic (ISO 15622 compliant).
  - **User Entity**: Provides two subcomponents:
    1. **3D Visualization FE**: Displays real-time ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths.
    2. **Control Panel FE**: Enables remote management (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (ROS2 ↔ Wi-Fi), ensuring message alignment and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system operates primarily during the **Design and Operational** lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation, simulation, and validation of ACC algorithms and system compliance with ISO 15622 standards.
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and optimization of the autonomous vehicle’s ACC system during active operation.
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: While retrofitting the physical twin involves manufacturing activities, the Digital Twin itself is not explicitly deployed during this stage; it is primarily used for post-manufacturing validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Real-time Data Accuracy**: LiDAR/camera data is processed via **DBSCAN clustering** and **Kalman filtering** to ensure object track precision.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency is capped at **100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185) to maintain deterministic control loops for ACC.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices are synchronized to **100 ms accuracy** (sufficient for distributed systems but not stricter standards like <1 ms).
  - **Validation**: ACC logic adheres to **ISO 15622** standards, ensuring safety and performance compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection employs:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **ROS2**: For intra-DT component communication (e.g., between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity).
    - **Wi-Fi (UDP)**: For inter-entity communication (e.g., between Digital Twin Entity and Control Panel FE).
  - **Network Architecture**: Distributed system with <100ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185 compliance).
  - **Synchronization**: ROS2 time synchronization ensures <100ms clock accuracy across distributed nodes."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across:
  - **Edge Layer**: **NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano** microcomputers on the vehicle for real-time processing (e.g., LiDAR tracking).
  - **Cloud/External Storage**: Vehicle state data is stored externally in a **SQL database** (e.g., cloud-hosted) for monitoring and reporting.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** enables modular deployment of FEs across hardware components, though edge/cloud layer distinction is not explicitly defined (implied by offloading ACC to the DT)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for digital twin development (adapted for automotive use).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements.
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (<100ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication.
  - **IEC 62541**: OPC UA for data translation (potential future adoption)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system prioritizes safety and security through:
  - **Functional Safety**: Compliance with ISO 15622 ensures ACC system reliability and adherence to performance standards.
  - **Latency and Synchronization**: Strict ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization requirements mitigate timing attacks and ensure deterministic behavior.
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands and ACC control commands are transmitted via secure Wi-Fi networks (UDP), reducing exposure to unauthorized access.
  - **Hardware Isolation**: The Physical Twin Entity runs on dedicated hardware (Jetson NX/Orin Nano) to isolate critical control logic from potential cyber threats."
]
